teams.name: Detroit Red Wings
teams.notes: Annual sale documented but recent dates not publicized publicly. Watch @DetroitRedWings and @shophockeytown.

teams.name: Toledo Walleye
teams.notes: Most reliable schedule — annual sale, late June through mid-July. Drifted later in 2025. Window opens June 1. 2025-26 season ended May 19 (lost to Fort Wayne Komets 4-2 in ECHL Central Division Finals).

latest_news.summary: Season over — lost to Fort Wayne Komets 4-2 in ECHL Central Division Finals (final game May 19). Postseason fan celebration held May 21 at Hensville Park. Window opens June 1. No sale announced yet.
latest_news.news_html: Season over — lost to Fort Wayne Komets 4-2 in ECHL Central Division Finals (final game May 19). Postseason fan celebration held May 21 at Hensville Park. Window opens June 1. No sale announced yet.

teams.name: Windsor Spitfires

historical_sales.notes: Mini-camp + equipment + Spits Gear blowout combined
Multi-day gear sale at The Crease / Blades, often around spring mini-camp

teams.notes: Spring mini-camp + gear sale is the typical pattern. Watch for July equipment sale announcement too.

latest_news.summary: Social media posts (X/Twitter + Facebook, ~May 9–10, 2026) promoted a Saturday gear sale, 9AM–Noon — jerseys, equipment clearance, merch. Sale likely already occurred. Watch for additional summer sale.

teams.name: Saginaw Spirit
teams.notes: Season ended April 2, 2026 (eliminated by Kitchener in Round 1). Facebook posts indexed by Google (~May 2026) suggest an end-of-year sale may have occurred or been announced — not yet confirmed.

latest_news.summary: Facebook posts indexed ~May 2026 suggest the End of Year Sale has already occurred. Season ended April 2 (eliminated by Kitchener, Round 1). Exact date unconfirmed.

teams.name: Flint Firebirds
teams.notes: No documented public equipment sale on record — monitor Bird's Nest and team socials.

teams.name: Sarnia Sting
teams.venue: Progressive Auto Sales Arena, Sarnia, ON

historical_sales.notes: Saturday equipment sale at The Honeypot, 10am–3pm

teams.notes: Look for both dedicated equipment sale (Saturday in May) and Honeypot Summer Sale (June).

latest_news.summary: Confirmed: Equipment & Clothing Sale Sunday June 21, 2026, 9AM–Noon inside the Sting dressing room at SSEC. Pro stock sticks, skates, gloves, helmets, goalie equipment, pants, practice jerseys, socks, team apparel. Cash only.
latest_news.news_html: Confirmed: Equipment & Clothing Sale Sunday, June 21, 2026, 9AM–Noon inside the Sting dressing room at SSEC. Items: pro stock sticks, skates, gloves, helmets, goalie equipment, pants, practice jerseys, game/practice socks, team-issued apparel. Cash only. Note: earlier May 28–29 URL was unconfirmed and redirected to homepage.

teams.name: USA Hockey NTDP
teams.notes: No documented public equipment sale — players move on each year so equipment turnover happens but rarely public. Worth monitoring.

teams.name: Michigan Wolverines

historical_sales.notes: Hockey gear listed on UM Property Disposition (purchased by Nic)
Hockey gear listed on UM Property Disposition (purchased by Nic)

teams.notes: UM doesn't run a public sale event. Surplus hockey gear gets listed on UM Property Disposition (dispo.umich.edu/sporting-goods) — typically late summer / early fall. Window has varied ~50 days between confirmed years (9/2/24, 10/22/25).

latest_news.summary: 2026-05-27: 4 hockey items detected on UM Property Disposition: Hockey Cage (silver), Renfrew Tape Split Roll (14/24mm white), Nike Hockey Pants (Small +1" navy), Shortside Hockey Tape Cloth (black 1.5"x540"). Pages may already be sold — UM Dispo listings are ephemeral.
latest_news.news_html: 2026-05-27: 4 hockey items newly indexed on UM Dispo — Hockey Cage (silver), Renfrew Tape Split Roll (14/24mm white), Nike Hockey Pants (Small +1" navy), Shortside Hockey Tape Cloth (black 1.5"×540"). Pages returned empty — may already be sold. Previous: Renfrew Tape Case (30-roll blue, 2026-05-26) — sold same day. 2026-05-13: Hockey Cage, Nike Pants, 4orte Bag — all sold within 1 day. UM Dispo listings are ephemeral; monitor year-round.

teams.name: Michigan State Spartans
teams.notes: MSU doesn't run a dedicated hockey sale, but MSU Surplus Store cycles items into 'Sporting Goods' and 'Athletic Apparel' categories. Hockey gear hasn't been confirmed there yet — Nic hasn't seen it personally — but Surplus does carry ice skates and athletic apparel. Worth watching as inventory rotates.
search_queries: MSU Surplus Store Spartan hockey gear

latest_news.summary: 2026-05-28: 2 MSU hockey jerseys on MSU Surplus — Bauer Gray MSU Hockey Jersey (Youth M/L) and White Munnsters MSU Hockey Jersey (Unisex XL). Ephemeral listings — may sell quickly. Previous: CCM ice skates and ASICS field hockey shoes from 2026-05-14, both sold.
latest_news.news_html: 2026-05-28: 2 MSU hockey jerseys newly listed on MSU Surplus — Bauer Gray MSU Hockey Jersey (Youth M/L) and White Munnsters MSU Hockey Jersey (Unisex XL). MSU Surplus listings are ephemeral — may sell same day. Previous: CCM Figure 8 Ice Skates (Men's 12) and ASICS field hockey shoes from 2026-05-14, both sold.

teams.name: Western Michigan Broncos
teams.notes: NCAA — no documented public equipment sales. Reigning 2025 national champion, so may have special memorabilia events post-title run.

teams.name: Bowling Green Falcons
teams.venue: Slater Family Ice Arena, Bowling Green, OH

historical_sales.notes: CCHA Playoff-themed auction with LiveSource (online auction, not in-person)

teams.notes: Auctions through LiveSource, online not in-person. Earlier season-end than the pro/junior teams. Predicted window now past for 2026 — no 2026 auction found.

teams.name: Grand Rapids Griffins
teams.venue: Van Andel Arena, Grand Rapids, MI

historical_sales.notes: Annual team equipment sale — sticks, pants, jerseys, helmets, shoulder pads, some game-worn
Annual Team Equipment Sale at Van Andel Arena banquet rooms, 6pm to end of 2nd period. Sticks, pants, jerseys, and more. Required game ticket to enter.

teams.notes: Red Wings' AHL affiliate. Annual sale in March/April — earlier than pro/junior pattern. 2026 sale confirmed April 10. Griffins eliminated May 22, 2026 by Chicago Wolves in AHL Central Division Finals — season fully over. No post-playoff equipment sale announced yet.

latest_news.summary: 2026 Annual Team Equipment Sale held April 10, 2026 — now past. Griffins eliminated May 22 by Chicago Wolves in AHL Central Division Finals. No post-playoff sale announced.
latest_news.news_html: 2026 Annual Team Equipment Sale was April 10, 2026 — now past. Griffins eliminated May 22 by Chicago Wolves in Game 5 of AHL Central Division Finals. Season over. No post-playoff sale announced.

search_queries: Griffins annual team equipment sale Van Andel

teams.name: London Knights

teams.notes: Marquee OHL franchise. No documented public equipment sale found — monitor anyway given size of franchise. Eliminated in OHL Round 1 by Soo Greyhounds.

teams.name: Kalamazoo Wings
teams.notes: ECHL — typical late-spring/early-summer pattern. No documented past sale, but Hockey Services (local pro shop, 6958 W Main St) carries their gear and is worth watching.

teams.name: Cleveland Monsters
teams.notes: Blue Jackets' AHL affiliate. No documented past sale, but AHL teams typically run them — worth monitoring.

latest_news.summary: Season ended May 24, 2026 — lost to Toronto Marlies 3-2 in Game 5 of AHL North Division Finals (Easton Cowan winner with 11 seconds left). Equipment sale window open. No sale announced yet.

meta_sources.name: Sports2K — Pro Equipment Sales forum
meta_sources.notes: Community-driven forum where users post sale announcements as they break. 230+ historical threads. Often surfaces sales before team press releases.

meta_sources.name: U-M Property Disposition — Sporting Goods
meta_sources.notes: Michigan-only — UM surplus office lists used hockey gear here, typically late summer/early fall. Items rotate, sometimes only listed for a few days.

meta_sources.name: MSU Surplus Store — Sporting Goods
meta_sources.notes: Michigan State surplus inventory. Hockey gear unconfirmed but inventory rotates — currently lists ice skates among other items.

meta_sources.name: MSU Surplus Store — Athletic Apparel
meta_sources.notes: Michigan State athletic apparel surplus — may include team jerseys, practice gear.
